import React from "react"; const TaskCard = ({ title = "", description = "", priority = "", status = "", date = "", image, type = "full", }) => { const statusClass = status.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, "-"); const priorityClass = priority.toLowerCase(); return (

{title}

{description}

Priority: {priority}
Status: {status}
Created on: {date}
{image && (
)}
); }; export default TaskCard;
